rationale: The two notes indicate strong core overlap: both are scanner-style multinomial logit simulation studies centered on unobserved heterogeneity/misspecification and evaluation beyond fit (parameter bias/recovery and prediction). The citing paper’s focus on household-level parameter recovery, fit, and forecasting plausibly uses the cited paper as a methodological/theoretical antecedent on bias from unobserved effects, and the reference is an exact DOI match. This is not clearly an incidental background mention.
